scripts.kill:server-port: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$port=3010; $conn=Get-NetTCPConnection -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.LocalPort -eq $port } | Select-Object -First 1; if(-not $conn){ exit 0 }; $procId=$conn.OwningProcess; $p=Get-Process -Id $procId -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if(-not $p){ exit 0 }; if($p.ProcessName -match 'node'){ Stop-Process -Id $procId -Force; exit 0 } else { Write-Output \"Port $port is in use by $($p.ProcessName) (PID $procId). Stop it or change PORT.\"; exit 1 }"
scripts.dev: npm run kill:server-port && concurrently "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.dev:server: npm run kill:server-port && npm --prefix server run dev
scripts.install:all: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
